query:
-- UTM источники трафика
SELECT 
  utmSource,
  utmMedium,
  COUNT(*) as visits,
  DATE(createdAt) as day
FROM utm_visits
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY utmSource, utmMedium, DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY visits DESC
LIMIT 20;
